entries.name: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN kind-first and role-first taxonomy comparison
entries.definition: A constructed comparison subject containing two deliberately competing candidate organizations: Organization K assigns one series-stable primary functional kind, while Organization R assigns contextual, potentially many-valued functional roles.
entries.boundary: The subject is limited to deterministic serialization of constructed cases. It does not establish category truth, completeness, utility, biological validity, external validity, mechanism effectiveness, or adoption readiness.
